title: EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World
innovation_summary: EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World: This paper introduces EvolvingWorld, a framework and benchmark for character and world co-evolution in interactive literary worlds.
